results.title: ‘He gives his all, 24 hours a day, to help the national team’: Portugal head coach on Ronaldo
results.description: Ronaldo, 41, is set to feature in a record sixth FIFA World Cup as he continues his quest to win the only major international trophy missing from his illustrious career.

results.title: Serena returns: Williams makes a winning comeback in doubles at Queen”s Club with Mboko
results.description: Serena Williams made a winning return to professional tennis at Queen’s Club, partnering with Victoria Mboko in doubles. The 44-year-old, a 23-time Grand Slam champion, impressed in her first match since 2022, but remains undecided about playing at Wimbledon

results.title: Pakistani airstrikes in Afghanistan kill 13 civilians
